title: Close or migrate resolved issues
description: Update or migrate issues 043, 045, 048, 049, 050 in issues.json to reflect their closure by this arc. Each issue either marks resolved with a reference to the relevant STORY/TASK, or migrates to a scope-owned finding registry per the PHASE-6 retroactive migration.
acceptance_criteria: issues 043, 045, 048, 049, 050 each have status resolved (or have been migrated to a scope-owned registry with the same terminal state)
Each resolved issue has resolved_by pointing to the commit or feature that closed it
